subject: Remove checkstyle warnings for SDC
commit_message:
Remove checkstyle warnings for SDC

This change intrduces a change th toe root POM that reports
checkstyle warnings. The line to prevent the build passing on checkstyle
warnings is commented out for now until all warnings have been removed.

Note: This change impacts the structure of Yaml files including
control loop definintions and heat templates because field names in
the Yaml POJOs do not comply with checkstyle rules. If impacts on the
Yaml templates are to be avoided, then this change shold be rejected
and some mechanism that overrides the checkstyle rules on those classes
must be included and approved.

Change-Id: Id8e3f159d0eca7e6d671095099e347d59df57bf6
Issue-ID: POLICY-166
Signed-off-by: liamfallon <liam.fallon@ericsson.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1:

I think we can remove those Heat Template YAML files - they were there for reference. I doubt there is code using them. 

But the Operational Policy YAML, the syntax is important. Let's override for this release. The service and resource naming matches the SDC Catalog API names for those objects. I think when we officially integrate with SDC service distribution, then we can revisit change it then.
Bummer.

Patch Set 1:

Liam, I'm thinking we better abandon this. The checkstyle warnings have improved but let's push to Casablanca finishing them.

Abandoned

abandon - we will do checkstyle later. Cutting a release tomorrow.
